# /en/changelog/v0.1.6

# v0.1.6

## Docs Improvements

- Added release notes content for the Keycast Windows docs site.
- Standardized document frontmatter metadata by migrating `date` to `createdAt`.
- Kept `title`, `description`, and `author` metadata aligned for consistent page header rendering.

## Fixes

- Fixed frontmatter being rendered as page content when documents use Windows `CRLF` line endings.
- Fixed inconsistent metadata presentation across the home page and documentation pages.

# /en/docs/advanced/display-modes

# Display Modes Explained

Keycast Windows provides 6 display modes, each optimized for specific usage scenarios.

## Mode Comparison Table

| Mode Name | Description | Config Value | Use Cases |
|-----------|-------------|--------------|-----------|
| Combo Keys Only | Only displays combo keys containing modifier keys | `combo-only` | Shortcut key demos |
| Single Keys Only | Only displays individual letters, numbers, and symbol keys | `single-only` | Typing demos |
| Combo Keys First | Prioritizes combo keys, displays single keys when no combo | `combo-precedence` | General scenarios |
| All Keys Continuous | Displays all keys, scrolls when keys are pressed continuously | `all-sequential` | Fast operations |
| All Keys Queued | Displays all keys, persists until timeout | `all-sequential-persistent` | Long recording |
| Smart Hybrid | Automatically switches modes based on typing rhythm | `smart-mixed` | Adaptive scenarios |

## Configuration Parameter Description

| Parameter | Description | Default Value | Range |
|-----------|-------------|---------------|-------|
| Combo Window | Time window for merging combo keys | 500 ms | 300-800 ms |
| Max Keys to Display | Maximum number of keys to display during continuous key presses | 5 | 3-20 |
| Continuous Key Window | Time window for determining continuous key presses in smart hybrid mode | 400 ms | 200-800 ms |
| Queue Idle Timeout | Timeout for clearing keys in **All Keys Queued** mode | 2000 ms | 200-5000 ms |
| Scroll Direction | Scroll effect when continuous keys exceed maximum count | Fade | Horizontal/Vertical/Fade |


---

# /en/docs/advanced

# Advanced Features

This section provides detailed information about Keycast Windows' advanced features and configuration options.

## Section Contents

- [Display Modes Explained](docs/advanced/display-modes)

# /en/docs/development/building

---
title: "Building"
description: "Keycast Windows build and release guide"
author: "Keycast Team"
createdAt: 2026-03-23
---

# Building and Packaging

Build release versions of Keycast Windows.

## Build Commands

### Complete Build

```bash
pnpm tauri build
```

This command will:
1. Create an optimized production build
2. Compile Rust backend code
3. Package into an installer
4. Generate executable files

### Build Output

After building, the installer is located at:
```
src-tauri/target/release/bundle/nsis/
```

File name format:
- `keycast-windows_0.1.4_x64-setup.exe` - Installer

## Build Options

### Build Without Bundling

```bash
pnpm tauri build --no-bundle
```

Only generates executable files, does not create an installer.

### Specify Target Platform

```bash
pnpm tauri build --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
```

## Code Checking

### Check Rust Code

```bash
cd src-tauri
cargo check
```

### Run Tests

```bash
cd src-tauri
cargo test
```

### Code Formatting

```bash
cd src-tauri
cargo fmt
```

## Optimize Build

### Reduce Size

1. Enable LTO (Link Time Optimization)
2. Use `--release` mode
3. Remove unnecessary dependencies

### Speed Up Build

1. Use incremental compilation
2. Parallel compilation
3. Cache dependencies

## Version Release

### Update Version Number

Modify the following files:

1. `package.json` - Frontend version
2. `src-tauri/Cargo.toml` - Rust version
3. `src-tauri/tauri.conf.json` - Application version

You can also use `pnpm version:sync versionNumber` to update version numbers

### Create Git Tag

```bash
git tag v0.1.4
git push origin v0.1.4
```

### GitHub Actions

Configure GitHub Actions for automatic build and release, already configured in .github/workflows/build.yml

## Release Checklist

<BadgeList>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">Update version number</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">Update CHANGELOG</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">Run tests</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">Local build test</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">Create Git tag</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">Push tag</BadgeList.Badge>
</BadgeList>

## Signing and Notarization

### Windows Code Signing

Sign the application with a code signing certificate:
Note that this signing certificate requires purchase, $200-500/year

```bash
signtool sign /f certificate.pfx /p password keycast-windows.exe
```

### SmartScreen Warning

First-time released applications may be warned by Windows SmartScreen, users need to:
1. Click "More info"
2. Select "Run anyway"


**Next Step**: Learn how to [contribute](docs/development/contributing) to the project.

# /en/docs/development/contributing

# Contributing Guide

Thank you for considering contributing to Keycast Windows!

## How to Contribute

### Report Issues

Found a bug or have a feature suggestion? Please:

1. Visit [Issues](https://github.com/shenjianZ/keycast-windows/issues)
2. Search for existing related issues
3. Create a new Issue, describe the problem or suggestion in detail

### Submit Code

#### Fork Project

1. Fork the project to your GitHub account
2. Clone your fork:
   ```bash
   git clone https://github.com/shenjianZ/keycast-windows.git
   cd keycast-windows
   ```

#### Create Branch

```bash
git checkout -b feature/your-feature-name
```

#### Commit Changes

1. Make code modifications
2. Write clear commit messages
3. Commit code:
   ```bash
   git add .
   git commit -m "Add: Describe your changes"
   ```

#### Push to Fork

```bash
git push origin feature/your-feature-name
```

#### Create Pull Request

1. Visit the original project's GitHub page
2. Click "New Pull Request"
3. Provide a clear PR description

## Code Standards

### Frontend Code

- Use TypeScript strict mode
- Follow ESLint rules
- Use Prettier to format code
- Use PascalCase for component naming
- File names match component names

### Backend Code

- Follow Rust naming conventions
- Use `cargo fmt` to format code
- Use `cargo clippy` to check code quality
- Add necessary comments and documentation

### Commit Messages

Use clear commit message format:

```
<type>: <description>

[optional body]
```

Types:
- `Add:` - New feature
- `Fix:` - Bug fix
- `Update:` - Update feature
- `Docs:` - Documentation update
- `Refactor:` - Code refactoring
- `Test:` - Add tests
- `Chore:` - Other changes

## Documentation Contributions

### Improve Documentation

1. Fork the project
2. Edit documentation in the `docs/` directory
3. Submit a Pull Request

### Documentation Standards

- Use clear headings
- Provide code examples
- Add appropriate links
- Use correct Markdown syntax

## Development Workflow

### Before Development

1. Check existing Issues
2. Comment on the Issue you want to handle
3. Wait for maintainer confirmation

### During Development

1. Follow code standards
2. Write tests (if needed)
3. Update related documentation

### After Development

1. Self-test the code
2. Ensure build passes
3. Submit PR and describe changes

## Get Help

### Community Support

- [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/shenjianZ/keycast-windows/discussions)
- [Issues](https://github.com/shenjianZ/keycast-windows/issues)

### Contact

Email: `15202078626@163.com`


**Thank you for your contribution!**

Every contribution makes Keycast Windows better.

# /en/docs/development/development-environment

---
title: "Development Environment"
description: "Keycast Windows development environment setup guide"
author: "Keycast Team"
createdAt: 2026-03-23
---

# Development Environment

Set up your development environment to build and run Keycast Windows.

## System Requirements

### Operating System

- **Windows 10** (version 1809 or higher)
- **Windows 11**

### Required Software

<BadgeList>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">Node.js 18+</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">pnpm 9+</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">Rust 1.70+</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">Git</BadgeList.Badge>
</BadgeList>

## Install Node.js

### Download and Install

1. Visit [nodejs.org](https://nodejs.org/)
2. Download the LTS version
3. Run the installer

### Verify Installation

```bash
node --version
npm --version
```

## Install pnpm

### Install using npm

```bash
npm install -g pnpm
```

### Verify Installation

```bash
pnpm --version
```

## Install Rust

### Install using rustup

1. Visit [rustup.rs](https://rustup.rs/)
2. Download rustup-init.exe
3. Run the installer

### Verify Installation

```bash
rustc --version
cargo --version
```

<Alert type="info">
Rust first-time installation will download necessary components and may take a few minutes.
</Alert>

## Install Git

### Download and Install

1. Visit [git-scm.com](https://git-scm.com/)
2. Download the Windows version
3. Run the installer

### Verify Installation

```bash
git --version
```

## Clone Project

```bash
git clone https://github.com/shenjianZ/keycast-windows.git
cd keycast-windows
```

## Install Dependencies

### Frontend Dependencies

```bash
pnpm install
```

### Rust Dependencies

Rust dependencies will be built automatically, first run may take longer.

## Recommended IDE

### Zed

Recommended extensions:

<BadgeList>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="info">rust-analyzer</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="info">ESLint</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="info">Prettier</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="info">Tailwind CSS IntelliSense</BadgeList.Badge>
</BadgeList>


## Environment Variables

To test automatic updates, you need to inject the environment variable `KEYCAST_WINDOWS_TAURI_UPDATER_PUBLIC_KEY`

```powershell
pnpm tauri signer generate -w $HOME/.tauri/keycast-windows.key
```

- Mapping after generation:
  - `$HOME/.tauri/keycast-windows.key.pub` file content → `KEYCAST_WINDOWS_TAURI_UPDATER_PUBLIC_KEY`
  - `$HOME/.tauri/keycast-windows.key` file content → `KEYCAST_WINDOWS_TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY`
  - Password entered when generating the private key → `KEYCAST_WINDOWS_TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY_PASSWORD`
- Release will additionally upload `latest.json`, Windows `setup.exe` and corresponding `.exe.sig` files for in-app updates.

```powershell
[Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable(
  "KEYCAST_WINDOWS_TAURI_UPDATER_PUBLIC_KEY",
  (Get-Content $HOME\.tauri\keycast-windows.key.pub -Raw).Trim(),
  "User"
)
```

- Check if written successfully:

```powershell
[Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable(
  "KEYCAST_WINDOWS_TAURI_UPDATER_PUBLIC_KEY",
  "User"
)
```

- Delete the variable:

```powershell
[Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable(
  "KEYCAST_WINDOWS_TAURI_UPDATER_PUBLIC_KEY",
  $null,
  "User"
)
```

- After setting or deleting, open a new terminal window before running `pnpm tauri dev`.

## Verify Environment

Run the following commands to verify environment configuration:

```bash
# Check Node.js
node --version

# Check pnpm
pnpm --version

# Check Rust
rustc --version
cargo --version

# Check Git
git --version
```

**Next Step**: Learn how to [run locally](docs/development/local-development) the project.

# /en/docs/development/introduction

# Project Introduction

Keycast Windows is a desktop application built with a modern tech stack, providing professional keystroke overlay functionality for Windows users.

## Project Overview

Keycast Windows adopts a frontend-backend separation architecture:
- **Frontend**: Built with React 19 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS for the user interface
- **Backend**: Built with Rust + Tauri 2 for system-level functionality
- **Communication**: Frontend-backend communication through Tauri's event system

## Tech Stack

### Frontend Tech Stack

- **React 19** - User interface framework
- **TypeScript** - Type-safe JavaScript
- **Tailwind CSS v4** - Atomic CSS framework
- **Radix UI** - Headless component library
- **React Router DOM** - Route management
- **Vite** - Fast build tool

### Backend Tech Stack

- **Rust** - System-level programming language
- **Tauri 2** - Cross-platform desktop application framework
- **Windows API** - Windows system calls
- **serde** - Serialization/deserialization framework
- **chrono** - Time handling library

### System Dependencies

- Tauri plugin system
- Windows API (user32.dll)
- System tray integration
- Global hotkey registration

## Architecture Design

### Frontend Architecture

```
src/
├── lib/              # Utility library
│   ├── utils.ts      # Utility functions
│   ├── types.ts      # Type definitions
│   ├── native.ts     # Tauri API wrapper
│   └── updater.ts    # Update logic
├── components/       # UI components
│   └── ui/          # Radix UI base components
├── pages/          # Page components
├── App.tsx         # App entry
└── main.tsx        # React root component
```

### Backend Architecture

```
src-tauri/src/
├── main.rs          # Application entry
├── commands/        # Tauri commands
│   ├── app_commands.rs
│   └── keycast_commands.rs
└── services/        # Business logic
    ├── keycast_service.rs
    ├── app_settings_service.rs
    └── window_service.rs
```

## Core Modules

### Keystroke Monitoring System (KeycastService)

- Uses Windows API to listen for global keystrokes
- Supports 6 display modes
- High-performance keystroke state tracking
- Memory management and performance optimization

### Configuration Management System

- Keystroke display configuration (KeycastOverlayConfig)
- Application settings management (AppSettingsService)
- Persistent storage
- Real-time configuration synchronization

### User Interface

- Responsive design
- Dark/light themes
- Internationalization support (Chinese and English)
- Accessibility features

## Development Philosophy

### Design Principles

1. **Simple and Efficient** - Lightweight design that doesn't affect system performance
2. **User-Friendly** - Intuitive interface, easy to configure
3. **Highly Customizable** - Rich configuration options
4. **Cross-Platform Ready** - Using Tauri to prepare for future cross-platform support

### Code Standards

- TypeScript strict mode
- Rust best practices
- Clear code comments
- Modular design

## Version History

See [Changelog](https://github.com/shenjianZ/keycast-windows/releases) for detailed version history.


**Next Step**: Learn detailed [Tech Stack](/docs/development/tech-stack) information.

# /en/docs/development/local-development

---
title: "Local Development"
description: "Keycast Windows local development running guide"
author: "Keycast Team"
createdAt: 2026-03-23
---

# Local Development

Run Keycast Windows locally for development and debugging.

## Development Mode

### Start Development Server

```bash
pnpm tauri dev
```

This command will:
1. Start the Vite development server
2. Compile Rust backend code
3. Open the application window

### Hot Reload

- **Frontend**: Modifying React/TypeScript code will automatically hot reload
- **Backend**: Modifying Rust code will automatically recompile

## Development Commands

### Common Commands

- Start development mode
    ```bash
    pnpm tauri dev
    ```
- Build release version
    ```bash
    pnpm tauri build
    ```
- Check Rust code
    ```bash
    cargo check
    ```
- Sync all project version numbers
    ```bash
    pnpm version:sync 0.1.4
    ```
- Format frontend code
    ```bash
    pnpm format
    ```
- Format Rust code
    ```bash
    cargo fmt
    ```

### Development Debugging

#### Frontend Debugging

1. Open browser developer tools
2. Press `F12` in the application window
3. View console output and network requests

#### Backend Debugging

1. View Rust compilation output in terminal
2. Use `println!` macro to output debug information
3. View Tauri logs

## File Watching

### Automatic Recompilation

Changes to the following files will trigger recompilation:

- `src/` - React/TypeScript source code
- `src-tauri/src/` - Rust source code
- `src-tauri/Cargo.toml` - Rust dependencies

### No Restart Required

Modifying the following files does not require recompilation:

- Style files
- Static assets
- Configuration files

## Common Issues

### Compilation Errors

<Alert type="warning">
Rust compilation failed

Ensure Rust toolchain is correctly installed:
```bash
rustup update
```
</Alert>

### Dependency Issues

<Alert type="warning">
Dependency installation failed

Try cleaning and reinstalling:
```bash
rm -rf node_modules
rm pnpm-lock.yaml
pnpm install
```
</Alert>

### Permission Issues

<Alert type="warning">
Windows Defender blocking

Add the project directory to Windows Defender exclusion list.

</Alert>


## Performance Optimization

### Speed Up Compilation

1. Use SSD for project storage
2. Close unnecessary antivirus software
3. Increase system memory

### Reduce Recompilation

- Run after batch code modifications
- Avoid frequent saves

## Development Tips


### Use TypeScript Type Hints

Take full advantage of TypeScript's type hints and auto-completion.


### Use Git Branches

Use feature branches for development, keep the main branch stable.
</Callout>


### Commit Code Frequently

Commit code frequently for easy rollback and version management.


**Next Step**: Learn how to [build and package](docs/development/building) the application.

# /en/docs/development/project-structure

# Project Structure

Keycast Windows adopts a clear modular structure for easy development and maintenance.

## Directory Structure

```
keycast-windows/
├── src/                    # React frontend source code
│   ├── lib/               # Utility library
│   ├── components/        # UI components
│   ├── pages/            # Page components
│   ├── App.tsx           # App entry
│   └── main.tsx          # React root component
├── src-tauri/            # Tauri backend source code
│   ├── src/              # Rust source code
│   │   ├── main.rs       # Entry file
│   │   ├── commands/     # Tauri commands
│   │   └── services/    # Business logic
│   ├── Cargo.toml        # Rust dependency configuration
│   └── tauri.conf.json   # Tauri app configuration
├── docs/                 # Documentation website
│   ├── public/           # Documentation content
│   ├── src/              # Documentation source code
│   └── package.json      # Documentation dependencies
├── keycast.html          # Keystroke overlay window
└── package.json         # Frontend dependency configuration
```

## Frontend Structure

### lib/ Directory

```
lib/
├── utils.ts              # Utility functions
├── types.ts              # TypeScript type definitions
├── native.ts             # Tauri API wrapper
└── updater.ts            # Update logic
```

- **utils.ts** - Common utility functions
- **types.ts** - Global type definitions
- **native.ts** - Tauri invoke API wrapper
- **updater.ts** - Automatic update state management

### components/ Directory

```
components/
├── ui/                   # Radix UI base components
├── AppShell.tsx         # Application framework
├── SettingsGroup.tsx    # Settings group component
└── [other components...]
```

### pages/ Directory

```
pages/
├── SettingsPage.tsx     # Settings page
└── AboutPage.tsx        # About page
```

## Backend Structure

### src/ Directory

```
src/
├── main.rs              # Application entry
├── commands/            # Tauri commands
│   ├── app_commands.rs         # Application settings commands
│   └── keycast_commands.rs     # Keystroke monitoring commands
└── services/            # Business logic services
    ├── keycast_service.rs      # Keystroke monitoring core
    ├── app_settings_service.rs # Application settings management
    └── window_service.rs       # Window and tray management
```

### Configuration Files

- **Cargo.toml** - Rust dependencies and package configuration
- **tauri.conf.json** - Tauri app configuration (window, plugins, etc.)
- **build.rs** - Build script (if needed)

## Documentation Structure

```
docs/
├── public/
│   ├── config/          # Configuration files
│   └── docs/           # Documentation content
├── src/
│   └── components/     # Custom MDX components
└── package.json        # Documentation dependencies
```

## File Naming Conventions

### React Components

- PascalCase: `SettingsPage.tsx`, `AppShell.tsx`
- Component file names match component names

### Rust Modules

- snake_case: `keycast_service.rs`, `app_commands.rs`
- Module file names match module names

### Documentation Files

- kebab-case: `display-modes.md`, `tech-stack.md`
- Use lowercase letters and hyphens

**Next Step**: Learn about [Development Environment](docs/development/development-environment) configuration.

# /en/docs/development/tech-stack

# Tech Stack

Keycast Windows adopts a modern tech stack to provide users with a stable and efficient desktop application experience.

## Frontend Tech Stack

### Core Frameworks

- **React 19** - User interface framework
- **TypeScript** - Type-safe JavaScript
- **Vite** - Fast build tool

### UI Components

- **Radix UI** - Headless component library providing accessible UI primitives
- **Tailwind CSS v4** - Atomic CSS framework
- **Lucide React** - Beautiful icon library

### Routing and State

- **React Router DOM v7** - Client-side routing
- **React Hooks** - State management and side effect handling

## Backend Tech Stack

### Core Technologies

- **Rust** - System-level programming language providing memory safety and performance
- **Tauri 2** - Cross-platform desktop application framework

### Windows Integration

- **Windows API** - Calling system APIs through winapi crate
- **GetAsyncKeyState** - Global keystroke monitoring

### Data Processing

- **serde** - Serialization/deserialization framework
- **chrono** - Date and time handling

## Tauri Plugins

### Official Plugins

- **tauri-plugin-opener** - Open external links
- **tauri-plugin-autostart** - Auto-start on boot management
- **tauri-plugin-global-shortcut** - Global hotkeys
- **tauri-plugin-updater** - Automatic update system

## Development Tools

### Package Manager

- **pnpm** - Fast, disk-space-saving package manager

### Code Quality

- **TypeScript strict mode** - Strict type checking
- **ESLint** - Code linting
- **Prettier** - Code formatting

## Architecture Features

### Frontend-Backend Separation

- Frontend: React + TypeScript running in WebView
- Backend: Rust handles system-level operations
- Communication: Frontend-backend communication through Tauri's event system

### Type Safety

- Frontend and backend share TypeScript type definitions
- Rust's type system ensures backend safety
- Tauri automatically generates type-safe API bindings

### Performance Optimization

- Rust zero-cost abstractions
- Minimized package size
- Fast startup and response


**Next Step**: Learn about [Project Structure](docs/development/project-structure).

# /en/docs/getting-started/basic-usage

# Basic Usage

## Start Keystroke Monitoring

> Keystroke monitoring is enabled by default in keycast

- Click the keystroke monitoring toggle button in the main window settings interface
- Use the global hotkey (default: Ctrl+Shift+K)


## View Keystroke Display

After enabling keystroke monitoring, try the following operations:

- Press `Ctrl+C` - Display combo keys
- Press `A` `S` `D` - Display according to the display mode
- Press `Ctrl+Shift+Esc` - Display complex combo keys

The overlay window will display keystroke information in real-time.

## Stop Keystroke Monitoring

- Click the keystroke monitoring toggle button in the main window settings interface
- Use the global hotkey (default: Ctrl+Shift+K)


## Exit the Application

Close the main window: Click the close button (×) on the main window, and the application will minimize to the tray.

To completely exit the software, right-click the tray icon and select **"Exit"**

Next Step: See [Configuration Basics](/docs/getting-started/configuration) to learn how to customize keystroke display.

# /en/docs/getting-started/configuration

---
title: "Configuration Basics"
description: "Basic configuration guide for Keycast Windows"
author: "Keycast Team"
createdAt: 2026-03-23
---

# Configuration Basics

> Click **Settings** on the left side of the main window to switch to the settings interface

## Style Configuration

1. Select Theme
    Choose a preset theme from the **Theme** dropdown menu.

    **Recommended**: For screen recording scenarios, the `text-only` or `minimal-light` themes are recommended to maintain simplicity and clarity.

2. Customize Colors

    1. Click the **"Text Color"** color block to select a custom color
    2. Enable **"Show Lines"** to display accent lines
    3. Click the **"Line Color"** color block to enter a hexadecimal color code (e.g., `#FF5733`)

### Adjust Position

Drag the **X** and **Y** sliders to adjust the overlay window position:

- **X**: Horizontal position (0 = left side of screen, higher values move right)
- **Y**: Vertical position (0 = top of screen, higher values move down)

You can preview the position adjustment in real-time after enabling keystroke monitoring.


## Display Mode Configuration

### Select Display Mode

<Callout variant="primary">
    It is recommended to start with Combo Keys First mode, which is suitable for most usage scenarios.
</Callout>

Select from the **Display Mode** dropdown menu:

<BadgeList>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="primary">Combo Keys Only</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="primary">Single Keys Only</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="primary">Combo Keys First</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">All Keys Continuous</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">All Keys Queued</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">Smart Hybrid</BadgeList.Badge>
</BadgeList>


### Adjust Combo Window

The **"Combo Window"** parameter controls how long key presses within will be merged into combo keys:

- Default value: `500 ms`
- Recommended range: `300-800 ms`
- **Too small**: May split rapidly pressed combo keys
- **Too large**: May incorrectly merge separate key presses

## System Configuration

### Auto-start on Boot

Enable the **Auto-start on Boot** option, and the application will automatically start when Windows logs in:

<Alert type="success">
After closing the main window, the application will remain in the system tray and can be reopened through the tray icon.
</Alert>

### Language Switching

Select from the **"Language"** dropdown menu:

- **Follow System** - Automatically switch based on system language
- **Simplified Chinese** - Force Chinese interface
- **English** - Force English interface


**Next Step**: See [User Guide](/docs/user-guide/overview) for more configuration options.

# /en/docs/getting-started/installation

---
title: "Installation"
description: "Installation guide for Keycast Windows"
author: "Keycast Team"
createdAt: 2026-03-23
---

# Installation

## System Requirements

<Alert type="warning">
Operating System: Windows 10 (version 1809) or Windows 11 (64-bit)

Memory: At least 4 GB RAM

Disk Space: Approximately 50 MB of available space

</Alert>

## Download Methods

### Official Channels

It is recommended to download the latest version from the GitHub Releases page:


Visit the [Releases page](https://github.com/shenjianZ//keycast-windows/releases) to download:
- `keycast-windows-setup-x.x.x.exe` - Installer (recommended)

Double-click to run `keycast-windows-setup-x.x.x.exe` and follow the wizard to complete the installation

<Callout variant="primary">
Note: The installer will automatically configure Windows Firewall rules to allow the application to listen for keyboard input.
</Callout>


## Verify Installation

After launching the application, the Keycast icon will appear in the system tray

Next Step: See [Basic Usage](/docs/getting-started/basic-usage) to learn how to get started.

# /en/docs/getting-started

# Getting Started

Welcome to Keycast Windows! This section will help you quickly install and configure the application.

## Section Contents

- [Installation](docs/getting-started/installation)
- [Basic Usage](docs/getting-started/basic-usage)
- [Configuration Basics](docs/getting-started/configuration)

# /en/docs/user-guide/display-modes

---
title: "Display Modes"
description: "Introduction to the six display modes of Keycast Windows"
author: "Keycast Team"
createdAt: 2026-03-23
---

# Display Modes

Keycast Windows provides 6 display modes, each optimized for specific usage scenarios.

## Mode Overview

<BadgeList>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="primary">Combo Keys Only</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="primary">Single Keys Only</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="primary">Combo Keys First</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">All Keys Continuous</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">All Keys Queued</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">Smart Hybrid</BadgeList.Badge>
</BadgeList>

## Quick Selection Guide

- Software tutorials/demos: Use **Combo Keys Only** mode to highlight shortcut operations.
- Typing teaching/password input: Use **Single Keys Only** mode to clearly show input content.
- Gaming/fast operations: Use **All Keys Continuous** mode to fully record key sequences.
- Long operation recording: Use **All Keys Queued** mode to persistently display operation history.
- General scenarios: Use **Combo Keys First** mode, the most adaptable.
- Advanced users: Use **Smart Hybrid** mode for the best adaptive experience.


## Mode Introduction

### 1. Combo Keys Only (combo-only)

Only displays combo keys containing modifier keys, ignoring individual letters, numbers, and symbol keys.

**Examples**:
- `Ctrl+C` → Display
- `A` → Don't display

**Use Case**: Software shortcut key demos

### 2. Single Keys Only (single-only)

Only displays individual letters, numbers, and symbol keys, ignoring modifier key combinations.

**Examples**:
- `A` → Display
- `Ctrl+C` → Don't display

**Use Case**: Typing teaching, password input demos

### 3. Combo Keys First (combo-precedence)

Prioritizes combo keys, displays single keys when no combo keys are present.

**Examples**:
- `Ctrl+C` → Display
- `A` → Display

**Use Case**: General scenarios, most adaptable

### 4. All Keys Continuous (all-sequential)

Displays all keys, shows in scroll direction when keys are pressed continuously.

**Examples**:
- `Ctrl+C` `A` `S` `D` → Display all

**Use Case**: Gaming operations, fast typing

### 5. All Keys Queued (all-sequential-persistent)

Displays all keys, persists until timeout.

**Examples**:
- Input `Ctrl+C` `A` `S` `D` → Persistent display
- Wait for timeout → Clear

**Use Case**: Long operation recording

### 6. Smart Hybrid (smart-mixed)

Automatically switches modes based on typing rhythm.

**Examples**:
- Slow typing → Display individually
- Fast typing → Display continuously

**Use Case**: Adaptive scenarios


**Next Step**: Learn how to configure [Theme Styles](/docs/user-guide/themes).

# /en/docs/user-guide/overview

# Overview

Keycast Windows is a fully-featured keystroke overlay tool. Here is an overview of the core features.

## Core Features

### 1. Keystroke Monitoring System

Global keyboard input monitoring that captures all key events and displays them in real-time.

### 2. Display Mode System

Provides 6 display modes to adapt to different usage scenarios:

- **Combo Keys Only** - Only displays modifier key combinations like `Ctrl`, `Alt`, `Shift`, `Win`
- **Single Keys Only** - Only displays individual letters, numbers, and symbol keys
- **Combo Keys First** - Prioritizes combo keys, displays single keys when no combo is present
- **All Keys Continuous** - Displays all keys, scrolls horizontally or vertically when keys are pressed continuously
- **All Keys Queued** - Displays all keys, persists until timeout
- **Smart Hybrid** - Intelligently switches display modes based on typing rhythm

See: [Display Modes Explained](/docs/advanced/display-modes)

### 3. Theme System

12 carefully designed preset themes covering different styles:

**Keyboard Cap Style**:
- `keycaps-dark` - Dark keyboard cap style
- `keycaps-light` - Light keyboard cap style

**Minimalist Style**:
- `text-only` - Pure text, no background
- `minimal-light` - Minimalist light theme

**Broadcast Style**:
- `broadcast-orange` - Orange broadcast style
- `broadcast-green` - Green broadcast style

**Glass Texture**:
- `glass-soft` - Soft glass effect
- `fresh-mint` - Fresh mint style
- `sky-card` - Sky card style

**Special Style**:
- `terminal` - Terminal style
- `neon-cyan` - Neon cyan
- `paper-card` - Paper card

See: [Theme Configuration](/docs/user-guide/themes)

### 4. Custom Styles

- **Text Color** - Customize text color (RGB/HEX)
- **Line Color** - Customize accent line color
- **Show Lines** - Control whether to display accent lines

### 5. Position and Time Configuration

- **X/Y Position** - Precisely adjust overlay window position
- **Combo Window** - Time window for merging combo keys
- **Continuous Key Window** - Continuous determination time in smart hybrid mode
- **Queue Idle Timeout** - Clear timeout in queue mode

### 6. Scrolling and Counting

- **Scroll Direction** - Horizontal, vertical, or fade in/out
- **Max Keys to Display** - Control display count during continuous key presses
- **Show Key Count** - Display key count during continuous display

## System Features

### 1. Global Hotkeys

- Customize system-level hotkeys
- Quickly toggle keystroke monitoring status
- Default hotkey: `Ctrl+Shift+K`

See: [Shortcut Settings](/docs/user-guide/shortcuts)

### 2. Tray Integration

- Minimize to system tray
- Tray icon right-click menu
- Tray icon status indication (active/standby)

### 3. Auto-start on Boot

- Supports automatic startup on boot
- Works with tray mode for background operation

### 4. Internationalization

- Built-in Chinese and English interfaces
- Supports following system language
- Real-time switching without restart

### 5. Auto-update

- Silent update check on startup
- In-app download of update packages
- One-click update installation

See: [Update Management](/docs/user-guide/updates)

## Interface Themes

- **Light Theme** - Bright application interface
- **Dark Theme** - Eye-friendly application interface
- **Follow System** - Automatically adapt to system theme

## Use Cases

### 📹 Video Production

- Software tutorial recording
- Product demo videos
- Technical sharing videos

### 💼 Remote Collaboration

- Online technical demos
- Remote training and teaching
- Product presentation meetings

### 🎮 Content Creation

- Game streaming
- Software teaching streaming
- Skill sharing streaming

### 🎓 Education and Training

- Software operation training
- Programming teaching
- Technical lectures


**Next Step**: Choose the appropriate [display mode](/docs/user-guide/display-modes) and [theme](/docs/user-guide/themes) based on your usage scenario.

# /en/docs/user-guide/position

# Position Settings

Adjust the position of the overlay window on the screen to fit your workflow.

## Position Configuration

In the **"Position & Rhythm"** section of the settings page, you can adjust:

### X Coordinate

- **Range**: 0 to screen width
- **Description**: Horizontal position of the overlay window, 0 represents the left edge of the screen

### Y Coordinate

- **Range**: 0 to screen height
- **Description**: Vertical position of the overlay window, 0 represents the top edge of the screen

## Common Position Settings


- Screen Recording Scenario

    It is recommended to place the overlay at the top center of the screen to avoid blocking important content.

    **Recommended Settings**: X=700, Y=24

- Live Streaming Scenario

    Can be placed in the corner of the screen without interfering with the game or application interface.

    **Recommended Settings**: X=24, Y=24

- Presentation Scenario

    Place at the top center of the screen for clear visibility.

    **Recommended Settings**: X=700, Y=24


## Real-time Preview

After enabling keystroke monitoring, adjusting the position sliders allows you to preview the effect in real-time, making it easy to find the most suitable position.


**Next Step**: Learn how to configure [Shortcut Settings](docs/user-guide/shortcuts).

# /en/docs/user-guide/shortcuts

---
title: "Shortcuts"
description: "Configure global hotkeys to quickly toggle keystroke monitoring"
author: "Keycast Team"
createdAt: 2026-03-23
---

# Shortcut Settings

Use global hotkeys to quickly toggle keystroke monitoring status without opening the main window.

The default global hotkey for keystroke monitoring is `Ctrl+Shift+K`

### Customize Keystroke Monitoring Hotkey

<Alert type="info">
Hotkeys must contain at least one modifier key (Ctrl, Alt, Shift, or Win).
</Alert>
On the settings page:

1. Enable **Enable Global Hotkey**
2. Click the **Start Recording** button
3. Press your desired key combination, release to complete recording


## Hotkey Function

When the keystroke monitoring hotkey is pressed:
- If keystroke monitoring is disabled → Enable monitoring
- If keystroke monitoring is enabled → Stop monitoring

A notification will appear on screen indicating the current status.

## Disable Hotkey

If you don't need the global hotkey function for keystroke monitoring:

1. Find **Global Hotkey** on the settings page
2. Uncheck **Enable Global Hotkey"**

## Reset to Default

Click the **Default** button to reset the hotkey to `Ctrl+Shift+K`.

## Use Cases

<BadgeList>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="primary">Quick start during recording</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="warning">Toggle anytime during streaming</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">Flexible control during presentations</BadgeList.Badge>
</BadgeList>

**Next Step**: Learn about [System Settings](docs/user-guide/system-settings).

# /en/docs/user-guide/system-settings

---
title: "System Settings"
description: "Keycast Windows system settings description"
author: "Keycast Team"
createdAt: 2026-03-23
---

# System Settings

Configure application behavior and system integration options.

## Auto-start on Boot

### Feature Description

When enabled, Keycast Windows will automatically start when the system logs in.

### How to Configure

In the **Startup** section of the settings page:

1. Check the **Auto-start on Boot** option

<Alert type="success">
After enabling auto-start, the application will run in the background and can be accessed through the system tray icon.
</Alert>

### Tray Integration

Auto-start works with tray mode:
- Application minimizes to system tray after startup
- Does not take up taskbar space
- Control application through tray icon

## Language Settings

### Supported Languages

- **Simplified Chinese** (zh-CN)
- **English** (en-US)
- **Follow System** - Automatically switches based on system language

### How to Switch

In the **Language** section of the settings page:

1. Click the **Language** dropdown menu
2. Select your desired language


<Alert type="success">
Language switching takes effect immediately without restarting the application.
</Alert>

## Interface Theme

### Theme Options

- **Light** - Bright application interface
- **Dark** - Eye-friendly application interface
- **Follow System** - Automatically adapt to system theme

### How to Switch

In the **Style** section of the settings page:

1. Click the **Theme** dropdown menu
2. Select your desired theme

## Monitor on Startup

### Feature Description

When enabled, the application will automatically start monitoring keyboard input on startup, without manually clicking the "Start" button.

### How to Configure

In the **Display** section of the settings page:

1. Check the **Keystroke Monitoring** option

<Callout variant="secondary">
If both auto-start on boot and monitor on startup are enabled, keystroke monitoring will automatically start after system login.
</Callout>

## Settings Storage

All settings are automatically saved to:
```
~/.keycast-windows/app-settings.json
~/.keycast-windows/keycast-overlay.json
```
**Next Step**: Learn about [Update Management](docs/user-guide/updates).

# /en/docs/user-guide/themes

# Theme Configuration

Keycast Windows provides 12 carefully designed preset themes covering different styles and scenarios.

## Theme Categories

### Keyboard Cap Style

Simulates the visual effect of real keyboard keys.

**keycaps-dark** - Dark keyboard cap style, suitable for recording with dark backgrounds

**keycaps-light** - Light keyboard cap style, suitable for recording with light backgrounds

### Minimalist Style

Clean and pure visual design.

**text-only** - Pure text display, no background, the cleanest style (recommended)

**minimal-light** - Minimalist light theme, fresh and clean

### Broadcast Style

High contrast themes suitable for live streaming and screen recording scenarios.

**broadcast-orange** - Orange broadcast style, high contrast, eye-catching (recommended)

**broadcast-green** - Green broadcast style, eye-friendly and comfortable

### Glass Texture

Modern glassmorphism design style.

**glass-soft** - Soft glass effect, full of modernity

**fresh-mint** - Fresh mint style, comfortable and natural

**sky-card** - Sky card style, light and transparent

### Special Style

Unique visual style themes.

**terminal** - Terminal style, suitable for technical demos

**neon-cyan** - Neon cyan, strong technological feel

**paper-card** - Paper card style, warm and natural


In addition to preset themes, you can also customize colors.

## Text and Line Colors
### Text Color

Click the **Text Color** color block:
- Supports selecting predefined colors
- Supports color picker selection
- Supports HEX color codes (e.g., `#FF5733`)

### Line Color

After enabling **Show Lines**, you can customize accent line colors:
- Used to highlight key combinations
- Recommended to use colors with high contrast to text color

**Next Step**: Learn how to adjust [Position Settings](/docs/user-guide/position).

# /en/docs/user-guide/updates

---
title: "Updates"
description: "Keycast Windows automatic update system"
author: "Keycast Team"
createdAt: 2026-03-23
---

# Update Management

Keycast Windows has a built-in automatic update system that makes it easy to get the latest features and fixes.

## Automatic Updates

### Check for Updates

The application automatically checks for updates on startup:
- Silent background check
- Does not interfere with normal use
- Shows notification when a new version is found

### Update Process

1. **Check for Updates** - Automatically checks on startup
2. **Download Updates** - Shows download progress
3. **Install Updates** - One-click install of update packages
4. **Restart Application** - Complete the update

<Alert type="info">
After the update package is downloaded, you can choose an appropriate time to click the "Install Update" button.
</Alert>

## Update Status

### Status Descriptions

- **Checking...** - Connecting to update server
- **New Version Found** - Update available, shows version number
- **Downloading...** - Downloading update package, shows progress
- **Downloaded** - Update package ready
- **Up to Date** - No updates available
- **Check Failed** - Network connection issue or server error
- **Download Failed** - Network interruption or insufficient storage

## Manual Check

If you want to manually check for updates on startup:

1. Open the main window
2. Click the **Settings** button
3. Click the **Check for Updates** button in the **App Updates** section

## Update Configuration

### Auto Check

Enabled by default to automatically check on startup.

### Disable Auto Check

If you don't want to automatically check for updates, you can disable it in application settings.

## Version History

View update history:
1. Visit [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/shenjianZ/keycast-windows/releases)
2. View update content for each version

## FAQ


<BadgeList.Badge variant="error">Update failed?</BadgeList.Badge>
Check network connection, ensure access to GitHub
<BadgeList.Badge variant="error">Slow download?</BadgeList.Badge>
May be a network issue, please retry later
<BadgeList.Badge variant="error">Install failed?</BadgeList.Badge>
Close the application and retry, or manually download and install

# /en/index

---
title: "Keycast Windows"
description: "A concise and efficient desktop keystroke overlay tool for Windows"
author: "Keycast Team"
createdAt: 2026-03-23
---

# Keycast Windows

<Callout variant="primary">
A concise and efficient desktop keystroke overlay tool for Windows, providing clear key feedback for screen recording, live streaming, presentations, and teaching.
</Callout>


- Lightweight transparent overlay window that doesn't interfere with desktop operations, perfectly adapted for screen recording and live streaming scenarios.

- 12 preset themes, support for custom colors and line configurations to meet different visual needs.

- 6 display modes, from simple combo keys to intelligent hybrid mode, adapting to various usage scenarios.

- Comprehensive configuration options including position, time window, scroll direction, and more for a personalized key display experience.

- Built-in Chinese and English interfaces with real-time language switching, friendly for international users.

- Built-in automatic update system to get the latest features and fixes in a timely manner.


## Quick Start

<Alert type="info">
System Requirements: Windows 10/11 (64-bit)
</Alert>

### Installation

Download the latest installer from [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/shenjianZ/keycast-windows/releases) and run it.

### Basic Usage

1. After launching the application, click the **"Start"** button to enable keystroke monitoring
2. Press any keyboard combination and the overlay window will display it in real-time
3. Adjust themes, position, and display modes in the settings page
4. Set global hotkeys to quickly toggle keystroke monitoring

## Main Features

### Display Modes

Keycast Windows provides 6 display modes to meet different usage scenarios:

<BadgeList>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="primary">Combo Keys Only</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="primary">Single Keys Only</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="primary">Combo Keys First</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">All Keys Continuous</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">All Keys Queued</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">Smart Hybrid</BadgeList.Badge>
</BadgeList>

For detailed information about each mode's use cases, see [Display Modes Explained](/docs/advanced/display-modes).

### Theme System

12 carefully designed preset themes:

<BadgeList>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="default">keycaps-dark</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="default">keycaps-light</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="default">text-only</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="info">broadcast-orange</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="info">broadcast-green</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="warning">minimal-light</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="warning">glass-soft</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="warning">fresh-mint</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">sky-card</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">terminal</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="error">neon-cyan</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="error">paper-card</BadgeList.Badge>
</BadgeList>

Browse all theme effects at [Theme Configuration](/docs/user-guide/themes).

## Use Cases

<Callout variant="secondary">
📹 Video Tutorials
Clear key display helps viewers understand the workflow and improves tutorial quality.

💻 Remote Demos
Provides intuitive key feedback in technical demos and product presentations.

🎮 Live Streaming
Display shortcuts and operation tips during game streaming or software teaching.

🎓 Software Training
Assist in explaining software operation workflows in corporate training and teaching scenarios.

</Callout>

## Documentation Navigation

- **[Getting Started](/docs/getting-started/installation)** - Download, installation, and basic configuration
- **[User Guide](/docs/user-guide/overview)** - Feature introduction and configuration instructions
- **[Advanced Features](/docs/advanced/display-modes)** - Display mode details and advanced configuration
- **[Development Guide](/docs/development/introduction)** - Tech stack and development documentation

# /zh-cn/changelog/v0.1.6

# v0.1.6

## 文档站改进

- 为 Keycast Windows 文档站启用并补充更新日志页面。
- 统一文档 frontmatter 元数据字段，将 `date` 迁移为 `createdAt`。
- 保留 `title`、`description`、`author` 等页面元信息，提升页面头部展示一致性。

## 修复

- 修复 Windows 环境下使用 `CRLF` 换行时，frontmatter 可能被当作正文直接渲染的问题。
- 修复首页和文档页元数据展示不统一的问题。

# /zh-cn/docs/advanced/display-modes

# 显示模式详解

Keycast Windows 提供 6 种显示模式，每种模式都针对特定的使用场景优化。

## 模式对比表

| 模式名称 | 说明 | 配置值 | 适用场景 |
|---------|------|--------|---------|
| 仅组合键 | 只显示包含修饰键的组合键 | `combo-only` | 快捷键演示 |
| 仅单个按键 | 只显示单个字母、数字、符号键 | `single-only` | 打字演示 |
| 组合键优先 | 优先显示组合键，无组合时显示单个按键 | `combo-precedence` | 通用场景 |
| 所有按键连续 | 显示所有按键，连续按键时滚动显示 | `all-sequential` | 快速操作 |
| 所有按键队列 | 显示所有按键，持久化直到超时 | `all-sequential-persistent` | 长时间记录 |
| 智能混合 | 根据按键节奏自动切换模式 | `smart-mixed` | 自适应场景 |

## 配置参数说明

| 参数 | 说明 | 默认值 | 取值范围 |
|------|------|--------|---------|
| 组合窗口 | 控制组合键合并显示的时间窗口 | 500 ms | 300-800 ms |
| 最多显示按键数 | 连续按键时最多显示的按键数量 | 5 | 3-20 |
| 连续按键窗口 | 智能混合模式下判定为连续按键的时间窗口 | 400 ms | 200-800 ms |
| 队列空闲超时 | 在**所有按键队列**模式下清空按键的超时时间 | 2000 ms | 200-5000 ms |
| 滚动方向 | 连续按键超出最大数量时的滚动效果 | 淡入淡出 | 横向/纵向/淡入淡出 |


---

# /zh-cn/docs/advanced

# 高级功能

本章节详细介绍 Keycast Windows 的高级功能和配置选项。

## 章节目录

- [显示模式详解](docs/advanced/display-modes)

# /zh-cn/docs/development/building

---
title: "构建打包"
description: "Keycast Windows 构建和发布指南"
author: "Keycast Team"
createdAt: 2026-03-23
---

# 构建打包

构建 Keycast Windows 的发布版本。

## 构建命令

### 完整构建

```bash
pnpm tauri build
```

这个命令会：
1. 创建优化后的生产构建
2. 编译 Rust 后端代码
3. 打包成安装程序
4. 生成可执行文件

### 构建输出

构建完成后，安装程序位于：
```
src-tauri/target/release/bundle/nsis/
```

文件名格式：
- `keycast-windows_0.1.4_x64-setup.exe` - 安装程序

## 构建选项

### 仅构建不打包

```bash
pnpm tauri build --no-bundle
```

只生成可执行文件，不创建安装程序。

### 指定目标平台

```bash
pnpm tauri build --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
```

## 代码检查

### 检查 Rust 代码

```bash
cd src-tauri
cargo check
```

### 运行测试

```bash
cd src-tauri
cargo test
```

### 代码格式化

```bash
cd src-tauri
cargo fmt
```

## 优化构建

### 减小体积

1. 启用 LTO（链接时优化）
2. 使用 `--release` 模式
3. 移除不必要的依赖

### 加快构建

1. 使用增量编译
2. 并行编译
3. 缓存依赖

## 版本发布

### 更新版本号

修改以下文件：

1. `package.json` - 前端版本
2. `src-tauri/Cargo.toml` - Rust 版本
3. `src-tauri/tauri.conf.json` - 应用版本

也可以使用 `pnpm version:sync versionNumber` 意见更新版本号

### 创建 Git 标签

```bash
git tag v0.1.4
git push origin v0.1.4
```

### GitHub Actions

配置 GitHub Actions 自动构建和发布，已经在 .github/workflows/build.yml 中配置

## 发布检查清单

<BadgeList>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">更新版本号</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">更新 CHANGELOG</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">运行测试</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">本地构建测试</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">创建 Git 标签</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">推送标签</BadgeList.Badge>
</BadgeList>

## 签名和公证

### Windows 代码签名

使用代码签名证书对应用程序进行签名：
注意该签名证书需要购买，200-500 $/年

```bash
signtool sign /f certificate.pfx /p password keycast-windows.exe
```

### SmartScreen 警告

首次发布的应用可能会被 Windows SmartScreen 警告，用户需要：
1. 点击"更多信息"
2. 选择"仍要运行"


**下一步**: 了解如何 [贡献](docs/development/contributing) 项目。

# /zh-cn/docs/development/contributing

# 贡献指南

感谢你考虑为 Keycast Windows 做出贡献！

## 如何贡献

### 报告问题

发现 bug 或有功能建议？请：

1. 访问 [Issues](https://github.com/shenjianZ/keycast-windows/issues)
2. 搜索是否已有相关问题
3. 创建新的 Issue，详细描述问题或建议

### 提交代码

#### Fork 项目

1. Fork 项目到你的 GitHub 账户
2. 克隆你的 Fork：
   ```bash
   git clone https://github.com/shenjianZ/keycast-windows.git
   cd keycast-windows
   ```

#### 创建分支

```bash
git checkout -b feature/your-feature-name
```

#### 提交更改

1. 进行代码修改
2. 编写清晰的提交信息
3. 提交代码：
   ```bash
   git add .
   git commit -m "Add: 描述你的更改"
   ```

#### 推送到 Fork

```bash
git push origin feature/your-feature-name
```

#### 创建 Pull Request

1. 访问原项目的 GitHub 页面
2. 点击 "New Pull Request"
3. 提供清晰的 PR 描述

## 代码规范

### 前端代码

- 使用 TypeScript 严格模式
- 遵循 ESLint 规则
- 使用 Prettier 格式化代码
- 组件使用 PascalCase 命名
- 文件名与组件名一致

### 后端代码

- 遵循 Rust 命名规范
- 使用 `cargo fmt` 格式化代码
- 使用 `cargo clippy` 检查代码质量
- 添加必要的注释和文档

### 提交信息

使用清晰的提交信息格式：

```
<type>: <description>

[optional body]
```

类型：
- `Add:` - 新功能
- `Fix:` - 修复 bug
- `Update:` - 更新功能
- `Docs:` - 文档更新
- `Refactor:` - 代码重构
- `Test:` - 添加测试
- `Chore:` - 其他更改

## 文档贡献

### 改进文档

1. Fork 项目
2. 编辑 `docs/` 目录下的文档
3. 提交 Pull Request

### 文档规范

- 使用清晰的标题
- 提供代码示例
- 添加适当的链接
- 使用正确的 Markdown 语法

## 开发流程

### 开发前

1. 查看现有 Issues
2. 评论你想处理的 Issue
3. 等待维护者确认

### 开发中

1. 遵循代码规范
2. 编写测试（如果需要）
3. 更新相关文档

### 开发后

1. 自测代码
2. 确保构建通过
3. 提交 PR 并描述更改

## 获取帮助

### 社区支持

- [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/shenjianZ/keycast-windows/discussions)
- [Issues](https://github.com/shenjianZ/keycast-windows/issues)

### 联系方式

Email: `15202078626@163.com`


**感谢你的贡献！**

每一个贡献都让 Keycast Windows 变得更好。

# /zh-cn/docs/development/development-environment

---
title: "开发环境"
description: "Keycast Windows 开发环境配置指南"
author: "Keycast Team"
createdAt: 2026-03-23
---

# 开发环境

配置你的开发环境以构建和运行 Keycast Windows。

## 系统要求

### 操作系统

- **Windows 10** (版本 1809 或更高)
- **Windows 11**

### 必需软件

<BadgeList>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">Node.js 18+</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">pnpm 9+</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">Rust 1.70+</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">Git</BadgeList.Badge>
</BadgeList>

## 安装 Node.js

### 下载和安装

1. 访问 [nodejs.org](https://nodejs.org/)
2. 下载 LTS 版本
3. 运行安装程序

### 验证安装

```bash
node --version
npm --version
```

## 安装 pnpm

### 使用 npm 安装

```bash
npm install -g pnpm
```

### 验证安装

```bash
pnpm --version
```

## 安装 Rust

### 使用 rustup 安装

1. 访问 [rustup.rs](https://rustup.rs/)
2. 下载 rustup-init.exe
3. 运行安装程序

### 验证安装

```bash
rustc --version
cargo --version
```

<Alert type="info">
Rust 首次安装会下载必要的组件，可能需要几分钟时间。
</Alert>

## 安装 Git

### 下载和安装

1. 访问 [git-scm.com](https://git-scm.com/)
2. 下载 Windows 版本
3. 运行安装程序

### 验证安装

```bash
git --version
```

## 克隆项目

```bash
git clone https://github.com/shenjianZ/keycast-windows.git
cd keycast-windows
```

## 安装依赖

### 前端依赖

```bash
pnpm install
```

### Rust 依赖

Rust 依赖会自动构建，首次运行可能需要较长时间。

## 推荐 IDE

### Zed

推荐的扩展：

<BadgeList>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="info">rust-analyzer</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="info">ESLint</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="info">Prettier</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="info">Tailwind CSS IntelliSense</BadgeList.Badge>
</BadgeList>


## 环境变量

如果需要测试自动更新，需要注入环境变量 `KEYCAST_WINDOWS_TAURI_UPDATER_PUBLIC_KEY`

```powershell
pnpm tauri signer generate -w $HOME/.tauri/keycast-windows.key
```

- 生成后对应关系：
  - `$HOME/.tauri/keycast-windows.key.pub` 文件内容 -> `KEYCAST_WINDOWS_TAURI_UPDATER_PUBLIC_KEY`
  - `$HOME/.tauri/keycast-windows.key` 文件内容 -> `KEYCAST_WINDOWS_TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY`
  - 生成私钥时输入的密码 -> `KEYCAST_WINDOWS_TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY_PASSWORD`
- Release 会额外上传 `latest.json`、Windows `setup.exe` 和对应的 `.exe.sig` 文件，供应用内更新使用。

```powershell
[Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable(
  "KEYCAST_WINDOWS_TAURI_UPDATER_PUBLIC_KEY",
  (Get-Content $HOME\.tauri\keycast-windows.key.pub -Raw).Trim(),
  "User"
)
```

- 查看是否写入成功：

```powershell
[Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable(
  "KEYCAST_WINDOWS_TAURI_UPDATER_PUBLIC_KEY",
  "User"
)
```

- 删除该变量：

```powershell
[Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable(
  "KEYCAST_WINDOWS_TAURI_UPDATER_PUBLIC_KEY",
  $null,
  "User"
)
```

- 设置或删除后，重新打开一个新的终端窗口再执行 `pnpm tauri dev`。

## 验证环境

运行以下命令验证环境配置：

```bash
# 检查 Node.js
node --version

# 检查 pnpm
pnpm --version

# 检查 Rust
rustc --version
cargo --version

# 检查 Git
git --version
```

**下一步**: 了解如何 [本地运行](docs/development/local-development) 项目。

# /zh-cn/docs/development/introduction

# 项目介绍

Keycast Windows 是一个使用现代技术栈构建的桌面应用，为 Windows 用户提供专业的按键屏显功能。

## 项目概述

Keycast Windows 采用前后端分离架构：
- **前端**: 使用 React 19 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS 构建用户界面
- **后端**: 使用 Rust + Tauri 2 实现系统级功能
- **通信**: 通过 Tauri 的事件系统实现前后端通信

## 技术栈

### 前端技术栈

- **React 19** - 用户界面框架
- **TypeScript** - 类型安全的 JavaScript
- **Tailwind CSS v4** - 原子化 CSS 框架
- **Radix UI** - 无头组件库
- **React Router DOM** - 路由管理
- **Vite** - 快速的构建工具

### 后端技术栈

- **Rust** - 系统级编程语言
- **Tauri 2** - 跨平台桌面应用框架
- **Windows API** - Windows 系统调用
- **serde** - 序列化/反序列化框架
- **chrono** - 时间处理库

### 系统依赖

- Tauri 插件系统
- Windows API (user32.dll)
- 系统托盘集成
- 全局快捷键注册

## 架构设计

### 前端架构

```
src/
├── lib/              # 工具库
│   ├── utils.ts      # 工具函数
│   ├── types.ts      # 类型定义
│   ├── native.ts     # Tauri API 封装
│   └── updater.ts    # 更新逻辑
├── components/       # UI 组件
│   └── ui/          # Radix UI 基础组件
├── pages/          # 页面组件
├── App.tsx         # 应用入口
└── main.tsx        # React 根组件
```

### 后端架构

```
src-tauri/src/
├── main.rs          # 应用入口
├── commands/        # Tauri 命令
│   ├── app_commands.rs
│   └── keycast_commands.rs
└── services/        # 业务逻辑
    ├── keycast_service.rs
    ├── app_settings_service.rs
    └── window_service.rs
```

## 核心模块

### 按键监听系统 (KeycastService)

- 使用 Windows API 监听全局按键
- 支持 6 种显示模式
- 高性能按键状态跟踪
- 内存管理和性能优化

### 配置管理系统

- 按键显示配置 (KeycastOverlayConfig)
- 应用设置管理 (AppSettingsService)
- 持久化存储
- 实时配置同步

### 用户界面

- 响应式设计
- 深色/浅色主题
- 国际化支持 (中英文)
- 无障碍功能

## 开发理念

### 设计原则

1. **简洁高效** - 轻量级设计，不影响系统性能
2. **用户友好** - 直观的界面，易于配置
3. **高度可定制** - 丰富的配置选项
4. **跨平台准备** - 使用 Tauri 为未来跨平台做准备

### 代码规范

- TypeScript 严格模式
- Rust 最佳实践
- 清晰的代码注释
- 模块化设计

## 版本历史

查看 [更新日志](https://github.com/shenjianZ/keycast-windows/releases) 了解详细版本历史。


**下一步**: 了解详细的 [技术栈](/docs/development/tech-stack) 信息。

# /zh-cn/docs/development/local-development

---
title: "本地运行"
description: "Keycast Windows 本地开发运行指南"
author: "Keycast Team"
createdAt: 2026-03-23
---

# 本地运行

在本地运行 Keycast Windows 进行开发和调试。

## 开发模式

### 启动开发服务器

```bash
pnpm tauri dev
```

这个命令会：
1. 启动 Vite 开发服务器
2. 编译 Rust 后端代码
3. 打开应用窗口

### 热重载

- **前端**: 修改 React/TypeScript 代码会自动热重载
- **后端**: 修改 Rust 代码会自动重新编译

## 开发命令

### 常用命令

- 启动开发模式
    ```bash
    pnpm tauri dev 
    ```
-  构建发布版本
    ```bash
    pnpm tauri build
    ```
- 检查 Rust 代码
    ```bsah
    cargo check 
    ```
- 同步项目所有版本号
    ```bash
    pnpm version:sync 0.1.4
    ```
- 格式化前端代码
    ```bash
    pnpm format
    ```
- 格式化Rust代码
    ```bash
    cargo fmt
    ```

### 开发调试

#### 前端调试

1. 打开浏览器开发者工具
2. 在应用窗口中按 `F12`
3. 查看控制台输出和网络请求

#### 后端调试

1. 在终端查看 Rust 编译输出
2. 使用 `println!` 宏输出调试信息
3. 查看 Tauri 日志

## 文件监听

### 自动重新编译

以下文件变更会触发重新编译：

- `src/` - React/TypeScript 源码
- `src-tauri/src/` - Rust 源码
- `src-tauri/Cargo.toml` - Rust 依赖

### 不需要重启

修改以下文件不需要重新编译：

- 样式文件
- 静态资源
- 配置文件

## 常见问题

### 编译错误

<Alert type="warning">
Rust 编译失败

确保 Rust 工具链已正确安装：
```bash
rustup update
```
</Alert>

### 依赖问题

<Alert type="warning">
依赖安装失败

尝试清理并重新安装：
```bash
rm -rf node_modules
rm pnpm-lock.yaml
pnpm install
```
</Alert>

### 权限问题

<Alert type="warning">
Windows Defender 拦截

将项目目录添加到 Windows Defender 的排除列表。

</Alert>


## 性能优化

### 加快编译速度

1. 使用 SSD 存储项目
2. 关闭不必要的杀毒软件
3. 增加系统内存

### 减少重新编译

- 批量修改代码后再运行
- 避免频繁保存

## 开发技巧


### 使用 TypeScript 类型提示

充分利用 TypeScript 的类型提示和自动补全功能。


### 利用 Git 分支

使用功能分支进行开发，保持主分支稳定。
</Callout>


### 定期提交代码

频繁提交代码，方便回滚和版本管理。


**下一步**: 了解如何 [构建打包](docs/development/building) 应用。

# /zh-cn/docs/development/project-structure

# 项目结构

Keycast Windows 采用清晰的模块化结构，便于开发和维护。

## 目录结构

```
keycast-windows/
├── src/                    # React 前端源码
│   ├── lib/               # 工具库
│   ├── components/        # UI 组件
│   ├── pages/            # 页面组件
│   ├── App.tsx           # 应用入口
│   └── main.tsx          # React 根组件
├── src-tauri/            # Tauri 后端源码
│   ├── src/              # Rust 源码
│   │   ├── main.rs       # 入口文件
│   │   ├── commands/     # Tauri 命令
│   │   └── services/    # 业务逻辑
│   ├── Cargo.toml        # Rust 依赖配置
│   └── tauri.conf.json   # Tauri 应用配置
├── docs/                 # 文档网站
│   ├── public/           # 文档内容
│   ├── src/              # 文档源码
│   └── package.json      # 文档依赖
├── keycast.html          # 按键屏显窗口
└── package.json         # 前端依赖配置
```

## 前端结构

### lib/ 目录

```
lib/
├── utils.ts              # 工具函数
├── types.ts              # TypeScript 类型定义
├── native.ts             # Tauri API 封装
└── updater.ts            # 更新逻辑
```

- **utils.ts** - 通用工具函数
- **types.ts** - 全局类型定义
- **native.ts** - Tauri invoke API 封装
- **updater.ts** - 自动更新状态管理

### components/ 目录

```
components/
├── ui/                   # Radix UI 基础组件
├── AppShell.tsx         # 应用框架
├── SettingsGroup.tsx    # 设置分组组件
└── [其他组件...]
```

### pages/ 目录

```
pages/
├── SettingsPage.tsx     # 设置页面
└── AboutPage.tsx        # 关于页面
```

## 后端结构

### src/ 目录

```
src/
├── main.rs              # 应用入口
├── commands/            # Tauri 命令
│   ├── app_commands.rs         # 应用设置命令
│   └── keycast_commands.rs     # 按键监听命令
└── services/            # 业务逻辑服务
    ├── keycast_service.rs      # 按键监听核心
    ├── app_settings_service.rs # 应用设置管理
    └── window_service.rs       # 窗口和托盘管理
```

### 配置文件

- **Cargo.toml** - Rust 依赖和包配置
- **tauri.conf.json** - Tauri 应用配置（窗口、插件等）
- **build.rs** - 构建脚本（如果需要）

## 文档结构

```
docs/
├── public/
│   ├── config/          # 配置文件
│   └── docs/           # 文档内容
├── src/
│   └── components/     # 自定义 MDX 组件
└── package.json        # 文档依赖
```

## 文件命名约定

### React 组件

- PascalCase: `SettingsPage.tsx`, `AppShell.tsx`
- 组件文件与组件名一致

### Rust 模块

- snake_case: `keycast_service.rs`, `app_commands.rs`
- 模块文件与模块名一致

### 文档文件

- kebab-case: `display-modes.md`, `tech-stack.md`
- 使用小写字母和连字符

**下一步**: 了解 [开发环境](docs/development/development-environment) 配置。

# /zh-cn/docs/development/tech-stack

# 技术栈

Keycast Windows 采用现代化的技术栈，为用户提供稳定高效的桌面应用体验。

## 前端技术栈

### 核心框架

- **React 19** - 用户界面框架
- **TypeScript** - 类型安全的 JavaScript
- **Vite** - 快速的构建工具

### UI 组件

- **Radix UI** - 无头组件库，提供可访问的 UI 原语
- **Tailwind CSS v4** - 原子化 CSS 框架
- **Lucide React** - 精美的图标库

### 路由和状态

- **React Router DOM v7** - 客户端路由
- **React Hooks** - 状态管理和副作用处理

## 后端技术栈

### 核心技术

- **Rust** - 系统级编程语言，提供内存安全和性能
- **Tauri 2** - 跨平台桌面应用框架

### Windows 集成

- **Windows API** - 通过 winapi crate 调用系统 API
- **GetAsyncKeyState** - 全局按键监听

### 数据处理

- **serde** - 序列化/反序列化框架
- **chrono** - 日期和时间处理

## Tauri 插件

### 官方插件

- **tauri-plugin-opener** - 打开外部链接
- **tauri-plugin-autostart** - 开机自启管理
- **tauri-plugin-global-shortcut** - 全局快捷键
- **tauri-plugin-updater** - 自动更新系统

## 开发工具

### 包管理器

- **pnpm** - 快速、节省磁盘空间的包管理器

### 代码质量

- **TypeScript strict mode** - 严格类型检查
- **ESLint** - 代码检查
- **Prettier** - 代码格式化

## 架构特点

### 前后端分离

- 前端：React + TypeScript 运行在 WebView 中
- 后端：Rust 处理系统级操作
- 通信：通过 Tauri 的事件系统进行前后端通信

### 类型安全

- 前后端共享 TypeScript 类型定义
- Rust 的类型系统确保后端安全性
- Tauri 自动生成类型安全的 API 绑定

### 性能优化

- Rust 零成本抽象
- 最小化打包体积
- 快速启动和响应


**下一步**: 了解 [项目结构](docs/development/project-structure)。

# /zh-cn/docs/development

# 开发指南

本章节面向开发者，介绍项目的技术栈和开发指南。

## 章节目录

- [项目介绍](docs/development/introduction)
- [技术栈](docs/development/tech-stack)
- [项目结构](docs/development/project-structure)
- [开发环境](docs/development/development-environment)
- [本地运行](docs/development/local-development)
- [构建打包](docs/development/building)
- [贡献指南](docs/development/contributing)

# /zh-cn/docs/getting-started/basic-usage

# 基础使用

## 启动按键监听

> keycast 按键捷监听默认是自动开启的

- 点击主窗口设置界面的 按键监听 的开关按钮
- 使用全局快捷键（默认为Ctrl+Shift+K）


## 查看按键显示

启用按键监听后，尝试以下操作：

- 按 `Ctrl+C` - 显示组合键
- 按 `A` `S` `D` - 根据显示模式显示
- 按 `Ctrl+Shift+Esc` - 显示复杂组合键

屏显窗口会实时显示按键信息。

## 停止按键监听

- 点击主窗口设置界面的 按键监听 的开关按钮
- 使用全局快捷键（默认为Ctrl+Shift+K）


## 退出应用

关闭主窗口：点击主窗口的关闭按钮（×），应用会最小化到托盘。

如果需要完全退出此软件,右键点击托盘图标，选择 **"退出"**

下一步: 查看 [配置入门](/docs/getting-started/configuration) 了解如何自定义按键显示。

# /zh-cn/docs/getting-started/configuration

---
title: "配置入门"
description: "Keycast Windows 基础配置指南"
author: "Keycast Team"
createdAt: 2026-03-23
---

# 配置入门

> 点击主窗口的左侧的**设置** ，切换到设置界面

## 样式配置

1. 选择主题
    在 **主题** 下拉菜单中选择预置主题。

    **推荐**: 录屏场景推荐使用 `text-only` 或 `minimal-light` 主题，保持简洁清晰。

2. 自定义颜色
    
    1. 点击 **"文字颜色"** 色块，选择自定义颜色
    2. 启用 **"显示线条"**，可以显示强调线条
    3. 点击 **"线条颜色"** 色块可以输入16进制颜色代码（如 `#FF5733`）

### 调整位置

拖动 **X** 和 **Y** 滑块调整屏显窗口位置：

- **X**: 水平位置（0 = 屏幕左侧，数值越大越靠右）
- **Y**: 垂直位置（0 = 屏幕顶部，数值越大越靠下）

可以在启用按键监听后，实时预览位置调整效果。


## 显示模式配置

### 选择显示模式

<Callout variant="primary">
    推荐从组合键优先模式开始，这个模式适合大多数使用场景。
</Callout>

在 **显示模式** 下拉菜单中选择：

<BadgeList>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="primary">仅组合键</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="primary">仅单个按键</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="primary">组合键优先</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">所有按键连续</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">所有按键队列</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">智能混合</BadgeList.Badge>
</BadgeList>


### 调整组合窗口

**"组合窗口"** 参数控制多长时间内的按键会被合并为组合键：

- 默认值：`500 ms`
- 推荐范围：`300-800 ms`
- **设置过小**: 可能将快速按下的组合键拆分开
- **设置过大**: 可能将独立的按键错误合并

## 系统配置

### 开机自启

启用 **开机自启** 选项，应用会在Windows登录时自动启动：

<Alert type="success">
关闭主窗口后，应用仍会驻留在系统托盘中，可通过托盘图标重新打开主窗口。
</Alert>

### 语言切换

在 **"语言"** 下拉菜单中选择：

- **跟随系统** - 自动根据系统语言切换
- **简体中文** - 强制使用中文界面
- **English** - 强制使用英文界面


**下一步**: 查看 [用户指南](/docs/user-guide/overview) 了解更多配置选项。

# /zh-cn/docs/getting-started/installation

---
title: "下载安装"
description: "Keycast Windows 安装指南"
author: "Keycast Team"
createdAt: 2026-03-23
---

# 下载安装

## 系统要求

<Alert type="warning">
操作系统: Windows 10 (版本 1809) 或 Windows 11 (64 位)

内存: 至少 4 GB RAM

磁盘空间: 约 50 MB 可用空间

</Alert>

## 下载方式

### 官方渠道

推荐从 GitHub Releases 页面下载最新版本：


访问 [Releases 页面](https://github.com/shenjianZ//keycast-windows/releases) 下载：
- `keycast-windows-setup-x.x.x.exe` - 安装程序（推荐）

双击运行 `keycast-windows-setup-x.x.x.exe`，按照向导完成安装

<Callout variant="primary">
提示: 安装程序会自动配置 Windows 防火墙规则，允许应用监听键盘输入。
</Callout>


## 验证安装

启动应用后，系统托盘出现 Keycast 图标

下一步: 查看 [基础使用](/docs/getting-started/basic-usage) 了解如何开始使用。

# /zh-cn/docs/getting-started

# 快速开始

欢迎使用 Keycast Windows！本章节将帮助你快速安装和配置应用。

## 章节目录

- [下载安装](docs/getting-started/installation)
- [基础使用](docs/getting-started/basic-usage)
- [配置入门](docs/getting-started/configuration)

# /zh-cn/docs/user-guide/display-modes

---
title: "显示模式"
description: "Keycast Windows 六种显示模式介绍"
author: "Keycast Team"
createdAt: 2026-03-23
---



# 显示模式

Keycast Windows 提供 6 种显示模式，每种模式都针对特定的使用场景优化。

## 模式概览

<BadgeList>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="primary">仅组合键</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="primary">仅单个按键</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="primary">组合键优先</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">所有按键连续</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">所有按键队列</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">智能混合</BadgeList.Badge>
</BadgeList>

## 快速选择指南

- 软件教程/演示：使用 **仅组合键** 模式，突出快捷键操作。
- 打字教学/密码输入：使用 **仅单个按键** 模式，清晰展示输入内容。
- 游戏/快速操作：使用 **所有按键连续** 模式，完整记录按键序列。
- 长时间操作记录：使用 **所有按键队列** 模式，持久化显示操作历史。
- 通用场景：使用 **组合键优先** 模式，适应性最强。
- 高级用户：使用 **智能混合** 模式，获得最佳自适应体验。


## 模式简介

### 1. 仅组合键 (combo-only)

只显示包含修饰键的组合键，忽略单个字母、数字、符号键。

**示例**:
- `Ctrl+C` → 显示
- `A` → 不显示

**适用场景**: 软件快捷键演示

### 2. 仅单个按键 (single-only)

只显示单个字母、数字、符号键，忽略修饰键组合。

**示例**:
- `A` → 显示
- `Ctrl+C` → 不显示

**适用场景**: 打字教学、密码输入演示

### 3. 组合键优先 (combo-precedence)

优先显示组合键，无组合键时显示单个按键。

**示例**:
- `Ctrl+C` → 显示
- `A` → 显示

**适用场景**: 通用场景，适应性最强

### 4. 所有按键连续 (all-sequential)

显示所有按键，连续按键时按滚动方向显示。

**示例**:
- `Ctrl+C` `A` `S` `D` → 全部显示

**适用场景**: 游戏操作、快速打字

### 5. 所有按键队列 (all-sequential-persistent)

显示所有按键，持久化显示直到超时。

**示例**:
- 输入 `Ctrl+C` `A` `S` `D` → 持续显示
- 等待超时 → 清空

**适用场景**: 长时间操作记录

### 6. 智能混合 (smart-mixed)

根据按键节奏自动切换模式。

**示例**:
- 慢速输入 → 单独显示
- 快速输入 → 连续显示

**适用场景**: 自适应场景


**下一步**: 了解如何配置 [主题样式](/docs/user-guide/themes)。

# /zh-cn/docs/user-guide/overview

# 功能概览

Keycast Windows 是一个功能完善的按键屏显工具，以下是核心功能概览。

## 核心功能

### 1. 按键监听系统

全局键盘输入监听，捕获所有按键事件并实时显示。

### 2. 显示模式系统

提供 6 种显示模式，适应不同的使用场景：

- **仅组合键** - 只显示 `Ctrl`、`Alt`、`Shift` 、`Win`等修饰键组合
- **仅单个按键** - 只显示单个字母、数字、符号键
- **组合键优先** - 优先显示组合键，无组合时显示单个按键
- **所有按键连续** - 显示所有按键，连续按键时水平或纵向滚动
- **所有按键队列** - 显示所有按键，持久化显示直到超时
- **智能混合** - 根据按键节奏智能切换显示模式

详见：[显示模式详解](/docs/advanced/display-modes)

### 3. 主题系统

12 种精心设计的预置主题，涵盖不同风格：

**键盘帽风格**:
- `keycaps-dark` - 深色键盘帽风格
- `keycaps-light` - 浅色键盘帽风格

**极简风格**:
- `text-only` - 纯文本，无背景
- `minimal-light` - 极简浅色主题

**广播风格**:
- `broadcast-orange` - 橙色广播风格
- `broadcast-green` - 绿色广播风格

**玻璃质感**:
- `glass-soft` - 柔和玻璃效果
- `fresh-mint` - 清新薄荷风格
- `sky-card` - 天空卡片风格

**特殊风格**:
- `terminal` - 终端风格
- `neon-cyan` - 霓虹青色
- `paper-card` - 纸质卡片

详见：[主题配置](/docs/user-guide/themes)

### 4. 自定义样式

- **文字颜色** - 自定义文本颜色（RGB/HEX）
- **线条颜色** - 自定义强调线条颜色
- **显示线条** - 控制是否显示强调线条

### 5. 位置与时间配置

- **X/Y 位置** - 精确调整屏显窗口位置
- **组合窗口** - 控制组合键合并的时间窗口
- **连续按键窗口** - 智能混合模式下的连续判定时间
- **队列空闲超时** - 队列模式下的清空超时时间

### 6. 滚动与计数

- **滚动方向** - 横向、纵向或淡入淡出
- **最多显示按键数** - 控制连续按键时的显示数量
- **显示按键计数** - 在连续显示时显示按键数量

## 系统功能

### 1. 全局快捷键

- 自定义系统级快捷键
- 快速切换按键监听状态
- 默认快捷键：`Ctrl+Shift+K`

详见：[快捷键设置](/docs/user-guide/shortcuts)

### 2. 托盘集成

- 最小化到系统托盘
- 托盘图标右键菜单
- 托盘图标状态指示（活跃/待机）

### 3. 开机自启

- 支持开机自动启动
- 与托盘模式配合，实现后台运行

### 4. 国际化

- 内置中英文界面
- 支持跟随系统语言
- 实时切换无需重启

### 5. 自动更新

- 启动时静默检查更新
- 应用内下载更新包
- 一键安装更新

详见：[更新管理](/docs/user-guide/updates)

## 界面主题

- **浅色主题** - 明亮的应用界面
- **深色主题** - 护眼的应用界面
- **跟随系统** - 自动适应系统主题

## 适用场景

### 📹 视频制作

- 软件教程录制
- 产品演示视频
- 技术分享视频

### 💼 远程协作

- 在线技术演示
- 远程培训教学
- 产品展示会议

### 🎮 内容创作

- 游戏直播
- 软件教学直播
- 技能分享直播

### 🎓 教育培训

- 软件操作培训
- 编程教学
- 技术讲座


**下一步**: 根据你的使用场景，选择合适的 [显示模式](/docs/user-guide/display-modes) 和 [主题](/docs/user-guide/themes)。

# /zh-cn/docs/user-guide/position

# 位置调整

调整屏显窗口在屏幕上的位置，使其适应你的工作流程。

## 位置配置

在设置页面的 **"位置与节奏"** 部分，你可以调整：

### X 坐标

- **范围**: 0 到屏幕宽度
- **说明**: 屏显窗口的水平位置，0表示屏幕左侧边缘

### Y 坐标

- **范围**: 0 到屏幕高度
- **说明**: 屏显窗口的垂直位置,0表示屏幕顶部边缘

## 常见位置设置


- 录屏场景

    推荐将屏显放在屏幕顶部中央，避免遮挡重要内容。
    
    **推荐设置**: X=700, Y=24

- 直播场景

    可以放在屏幕角落，不干扰游戏或应用界面。
    
    **推荐设置**: X=24, Y=24

- 演示场景

    放在屏幕顶部中央，清晰可见。
    
    **推荐设置**: X=700, Y=24


## 实时预览

启用按键监听后，调整位置滑块可以实时预览效果，方便你找到最合适的位置。


**下一步**: 了解如何配置 [快捷键设置](docs/user-guide/shortcuts)。

# /zh-cn/docs/user-guide/shortcuts

---
title: "快捷键设置"
description: "配置全局快捷键快速切换按键监听"
author: "Keycast Team"
createdAt: 2026-03-23
---

# 快捷键设置

使用全局快捷键可以快速切换按键监听状态，无需打开主窗口。

按键监听的全局快捷键默认为`Ctrl+Shift+K`

### 自定义按键监听快捷键

<Alert type="info">
快捷键必须包含至少一个修饰键（Ctrl、Alt、Shift 或 Win）。
</Alert>
在设置页面：

1. 启用 **启用全局快捷键**
2. 点击 **开始录制** 按钮
3. 按下你想要的组合键,松开录制成功


## 快捷键功能

按下按键监听的快捷键时：
- 如果按键监听未启用 → 启用监听
- 如果按键监听已启用 → 停止监听

屏幕会显示通知提示当前状态。

## 禁用快捷键

如果不需要按键监听的全局快捷键功能：

1. 在设置页面找到 **全局快捷键**
2. 取消勾选 **启用全局快捷键"**

## 重置为默认

点击 **默认** 按钮可以将快捷键重置为 `Ctrl+Shift+K`。

## 使用场景

<BadgeList>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="primary">录屏时快速开始</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="warning">直播时随时切换</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">演示时灵活控制</BadgeList.Badge>
</BadgeList>

**下一步**: 了解 [系统设置](docs/user-guide/system-settings)。

# /zh-cn/docs/user-guide/system-settings

---
title: "系统设置"
description: "Keycast Windows 系统设置说明"
author: "Keycast Team"
createdAt: 2026-03-23
---

# 系统设置

配置应用的行为和系统集成选项。

## 开机自启

### 功能说明

启用后，Keycast Windows 会在系统登录时自动启动。

### 如何设置

在设置页面的 **启动** 部分：

1. 勾选 **开机自启** 选项

<Alert type="success">
开机自启后，应用会在后台运行，可通过系统托盘图标访问。
</Alert>

### 托盘集成

开机自启与托盘模式配合使用：
- 应用启动后最小化到系统托盘
- 不占用任务栏空间
- 通过托盘图标控制应用

## 语言设置

### 支持的语言

- **简体中文** (zh-CN)
- **English** (en-US)
- **跟随系统** - 自动根据系统语言切换

### 如何切换

在设置页面的 **语言** 部分：

1. 点击 **语言** 下拉菜单
2. 选择你想要的语言


<Alert type="success">
语言切换立即生效，无需重启应用。
</Alert>

## 界面主题

### 主题选项

- **浅色** - 明亮的应用界面
- **深色** - 护眼的应用界面
- **跟随系统** - 自动适应系统主题

### 如何切换

在设置页面的 **样式* 部分：

1. 点击 **主题**下拉菜单
2. 选择你想要的主题 

## 启动时监听

### 功能说明

启用后，应用启动时会自动开始监听键盘输入，无需手动点击"开始"按钮。

### 如何设置

在设置页面的 **显示** 部分：

1. 勾选 **按键监听** 选项

<Callout variant="secondary">
如果启用了开机自启和启动时监听，系统登录后会自动开始按键监听。
</Callout>

## 设置存储

所有设置都会自动保存到：
```
~/.keycast-windows/app-settings.json 
~/.keycast-windows/keycast-overlay.json
```
**下一步**: 了解 [更新管理](docs/user-guide/updates)。

# /zh-cn/docs/user-guide/themes

# 主题配置

Keycast Windows 提供 12 种精心设计的预置主题，涵盖不同风格和场景。

## 主题分类

### 键盘帽风格

模拟真实键盘按键的视觉效果。

**keycaps-dark** - 深色键盘帽风格，适合深色背景录制

**keycaps-light** - 浅色键盘帽风格，适合浅色背景录制

### 极简风格

简洁纯粹的视觉设计。

**text-only** - 纯文本显示，无背景，最简洁的样式（推荐）

**minimal-light** - 极简浅色主题，清爽干净

### 广播风格

适合直播和录屏场景的高对比度主题。

**broadcast-orange** - 橙色广播风格，高对比度，醒目突出（推荐）

**broadcast-green** - 绿色广播风格，护眼舒适

### 玻璃质感

现代玻璃拟态设计风格。

**glass-soft** - 柔和玻璃效果，现代感十足

**fresh-mint** - 清新薄荷风格，舒适自然

**sky-card** - 天空卡片风格，轻盈通透

### 特殊风格

独特的视觉风格主题。

**terminal** - 终端风格，适合技术演示

**neon-cyan** - 霓虹青色，科技感强烈

**paper-card** - 纸质卡片风格，温馨自然


除了预置主题，你还可以自定义颜色。

## 文字、线条颜色
### 文字颜色

点击 **文字颜色** 色块：
- 支持选择预定定义颜色
- 支持取色器选择
- 支持 HEX 颜色代码（如 `#FF5733`）

### 线条颜色

启用 **显示线条** 后，可以自定义强调线条颜色：
- 用于突出显示按键组合
- 推荐使用与文字颜色对比度高的颜色

**下一步**: 了解如何调整 [位置设置](/docs/user-guide/position)。

# /zh-cn/docs/user-guide/updates

---
title: "更新管理"
description: "Keycast Windows 自动更新系统"
author: "Keycast Team"
createdAt: 2026-03-23
---

# 更新管理

Keycast Windows 内置自动更新系统，让你轻松获取最新功能和修复。

## 自动更新

### 检查更新

应用启动时会自动检查更新：
- 后台静默检查
- 不干扰正常使用
- 发现新版本时显示通知

### 更新流程

1. **检查更新** - 启动时自动检查
2. **下载更新** - 显示下载进度
3. **安装更新** - 一键安装更新包
4. **重启应用** - 完成更新

<Alert type="info">
更新包下载完成后，你可以选择合适的时间点击"安装更新"按钮。
</Alert>

## 更新状态

### 各种状态说明

- **正在检查...** - 正在连接更新服务器
- **发现新版本** - 有可用更新，显示版本号
- **正在下载...** - 正在下载更新包，显示进度
- **已下载** - 更新包已准备就绪
- **当前已是最新** - 没有可用更新
- **检查失败** - 网络连接问题或服务器错误
- **下载失败** - 网络中断或存储空间不足

## 手动检查

如果想在启动时手动检查更新：

1. 打开主窗口
2. 点击 **设置** 按钮
3. 在 **应用更新** 部分点击 **检查更新** 按钮

## 更新配置

### 自动检查

默认启用启动时自动检查。

### 关闭自动检查

如果不想自动检查更新，可以在应用设置中关闭。

## 版本历史

查看更新历史：
1. 访问 [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/shenjianZ/keycast-windows/releases)
2. 查看每个版本的更新内容

## 常见问题


<BadgeList.Badge variant="error">更新失败？</BadgeList.Badge>
检查网络连接，确保能访问 GitHub
<BadgeList.Badge variant="error">下载慢？</BadgeList.Badge>
可能是网络问题，请稍后重试
<BadgeList.Badge variant="error">安装失败？</BadgeList.Badge>
关闭应用后重试，或手动下载安装

# /zh-cn/index

---
title: "Keycast Windows"
description: "简洁高效的 Windows 桌面按键屏显工具"
author: "Keycast Team"
createdAt: 2026-03-23
---

# Keycast Windows

<Callout variant="primary">
一个简洁、高效的 Windows 桌面按键屏显工具，为录屏、直播、演示和教学提供清晰的按键反馈。
</Callout>


- 轻量透明屏显窗口，不影响桌面操作，完美适配录屏和直播场景。

- 12 种预置主题，支持自定义颜色和线条配置，满足不同视觉需求。

- 6 种显示模式，从简单的组合键到智能混合模式，适应各种使用场景。

- 位置、时间窗口、滚动方向等全方位配置，打造个性化按键显示体验。

- 内置中英文界面，支持实时切换，国际化用户友好。

- 内置自动更新系统，及时获取最新功能和修复。


## 快速开始

<Alert type="info">
系统要求: Windows 10/11 (64 位)
</Alert>

### 安装

从 [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/shenjianZ/keycast-windows/releases) 下载最新的安装包并运行。

### 基础使用

1. 启动应用后，点击 **"开始"** 按钮启用按键监听
2. 按下任意键盘组合，屏显窗口将实时显示
3. 在设置页面调整主题、位置和显示模式
4. 设置全局快捷键，快速切换按键监听状态

## 主要功能

### 显示模式

Keycast Windows 提供 6 种显示模式，满足不同使用场景：

<BadgeList>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="primary">仅组合键</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="primary">仅单个按键</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="primary">组合键优先</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">所有按键连续</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">所有按键队列</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">智能混合</BadgeList.Badge>
</BadgeList>

详细了解每种模式的使用场景，请查看 [显示模式详解](/docs/advanced/display-modes)。

### 主题系统

12 种精心设计的预置主题：

<BadgeList>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="default">keycaps-dark</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="default">keycaps-light</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="default">text-only</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="info">broadcast-orange</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="info">broadcast-green</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="warning">minimal-light</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="warning">glass-soft</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="warning">fresh-mint</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">sky-card</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="success">terminal</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="error">neon-cyan</BadgeList.Badge>
  <BadgeList.Badge variant="error">paper-card</BadgeList.Badge>
</BadgeList>

浏览所有主题效果，请访问 [主题配置](/docs/user-guide/themes)。

## 适用场景

<Callout variant="secondary">
📹 视频教程
清晰的按键显示帮助观众理解操作流程，提升教程质量。

💻 远程演示
在技术演示和产品展示中提供直观的按键反馈。

🎮 直播讲解
游戏直播或软件教学时展示快捷键和操作技巧。

🎓 软件培训
企业培训和教学场景中，辅助讲解软件操作流程。

</Callout>
